import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Router } from '@angular/router'; @Component({ selector: 'app-sidebar', templateUrl: './sidebar.component.html', styleUrls: ['./sidebar.component.css'] }) export class SidebarComponent { constructor(private router: Router) {} logout() { this.router.navigate(['/']); } }
